playbook.intent: Q4 to books closed, taxes filed, next-year targets locked, service portfolio refreshed, compliance risks logged.
playbook.scope: Run an annual planning cycle that closes the books, files taxes, sets next-year revenue / margin / hiring targets, locks the service portfolio, and surfaces compliance risks before they bite. Exit artifact: annual-plan pack + closed books + filed returns + refreshed risk register.

success-criteria.criterion: Taxes filed or scheduled with accountant
Next-year revenue, margin, hiring targets locked
Annual plan signed off by the founder in writing

stage.name: Close books + file taxes
stage.intent: Honest financial picture before planning anything.

tasks.task: File taxes or schedule with accountant

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when books are reconciled and tax filing started.

stage.name: Plan targets
stage.intent: Revenue, margin, hiring targets - defensible numbers.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when targets pass the gut + math test.

stage.name: Refresh portfolio + ops
stage.intent: Service lines pruned, ops + contractor mix adjusted.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when each service line is in 'keep', 'refactor', or 'sunset' bucket.

stage.name: Risk + compliance
stage.intent: Surface risks now so they do not blindside next year.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: every high-impact risk has an owner + mitigation date.

extra.value: [Multi-year strategic planning - separate cadence, Investor-grade financial audit - out of scope for solo / micro-agency]
[Bookkeeping in place (Xero / QuickBooks / equivalent), Last 12 months revenue + expense data accessible]

['Setting next-year targets without closed books - fiction in, fiction out', Skipping the portfolio prune because services 'might come back', Treating compliance as a Q1 problem - late filings are expensive]
['Are the targets defensible to a stranger with the spreadsheet?', 'Did I actually drop or refactor a service, or only nudge?', 'Is the risk register updated, not just dusted off?']

{human: faion get-content annual-planning-and-financial-close --format md, agent: faion get-content annual-planning-and-financial-close --format context, json: faion get-content annual-planning-and-financial-close --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
